intro: Strathmere is located just outside Ottawa in North Gower. It’s a beautiful countryside venue, but because it’s outside the city centre, guests should plan transportation in advance.
noShuttle: There will not be a shuttle, and rideshare availability may be limited late at night.

sections.title: Venue address
sections.body: Strathmere, 1980 Phelan Road West, North Gower, ON K0A 2T0.

sections.title: Driving note
sections.body: Please give yourself extra time to arrive, settle in, and be seated before the 4:00 PM ceremony.

sections.title: Parking
sections.body: Parking will be available at Strathmere. More detailed arrival instructions will be added closer to the wedding date.

sections.title: Hotel blocks
sections.body: Hotel block information is coming soon.

sections.title: Ottawa-area stays
sections.body: Guests may prefer to stay in Ottawa, Barrhaven, Kanata, or nearby communities depending on their travel plans.

sections.title: Plan transportation early
sections.body: Because Strathmere is outside the city centre and there is no shuttle, please plan a safe ride in advance.
